seeding.L3_walkforward: 1311*s+17 (mirrors e_french_L3.py and D3 cost battery part A)
seeding.L1_walkforward: 911*s+13 (mirrors e_french.py walkforward and D3 part B)

config.convention: both arm and oracle pay their own turnover (net regret = net oracle - net arm); turnover = 0.5*sum|dz|*2 sides; arm-only-pays recorded as sensitivity (PREREG addendum E). Band: served book updates only if >= b+1 names would change; training identical to A1 (PREREG H).
